A huge grove of fig trees grows on this charter school property, right adjacent to Armour St. From mid-July to mid-August there is a huge bounty of delicious figs. Bring a ladder to get to the taller part of these trees. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
